purpose: Record precise workflow failures and safe recovery decisions without storing raw prompts or private data.
invariants: Every failure names where it occurred, what evidence was involved, and how recovery proceeds.
Retry is bounded and never expands tools, data, budget, or permissions automatically.
Insufficient evidence or conflicting verification moves the task to frozen or stopped.
Failure receipts are append-only artifacts and contain no hidden reasoning, secrets, or raw source data.
